title: The Infected Raids (Wither Storm Entities)
body:
⚠️[REQUIRES EMF-ETF] ⚠️

This is a resource pack inspired by the Wither Storm from Minecraft Story Mode.

Adds new models for:
- Pillager
- Vindicator
- Vex
- Evoker
- Evoker_fangs
- Ravager

Adds a new raid bossbar.

Thanks for the download!💛

[1.19.4 - 1.21.11]
